scripts.test: pnpm --dir apps/demo test && pnpm --dir apps/mvp test
scripts.check: pnpm config:check && node --check apps/demo/app.js && node --check apps/mvp/config.mjs && node --check apps/mvp/core.mjs && node --check apps/mvp/server.mjs && node --check apps/mvp/public/app.js && NODE_ENV=test node -e "import('./apps/mvp/server.mjs').then(({server})=>server.close())" && pnpm test
